description_long: This is a sleek, single-seat military jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a pointed nose cone. The aircraft is painted primarily in light gray, accented with bold red, white, and blue stripes along the wings, tail, and fuselage, reminiscent of aerobatic or national display team liveries. The wings are swept back and mounted low on the fuselage, with no visible winglets, and the tail features a conventional vertical stabilizer with matching tricolor striping. The cockpit is positioned forward and is enclosed with a clear canopy, providing good visibility for the pilot. The landing gear is of the tricycle type, with a single nose wheel and two main wheels visible. The engine exhaust is located at the rear of the fuselage, indicating a single jet engine configuration.
description: A streamlined, single-seat military jet airplane with swept low wings and bold red, white, and blue striping, featuring a forward enclosed cockpit and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, swept low wings, tricolor striping, and the forward cockpit canopy.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the jet exhaust, symmetrical wing sweep, and the tricolor pattern extending across the wings and tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the landing gear, cockpit, and tail markings.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the pointed nose, forward cockpit, and the full span of the swept wings with their distinctive color bands.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back configuration with no winglets and moderate dihedral angle.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main wheels, fixed
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy
